title: Figure 3 from: Lu C-T, Ren Y-L, Habib K, Zhang Q-F, Liu L-L, Kang J-C, Shen X-C, Wijayawardene NN, Al-Rejaie SS, Loinheuang C, Li Q-R, Long Q-D, Elgorban AM (2025) Two new species of Nigropunctata and the first report of sexual morph of Melanographium citri (Pallidoperidiaceae, Xylariales) from south-western China. description: Figure 3 Nigropunctata puerzhenensis (GMB4904, holotype). A. Material; B. Ostiole appearance at the host surface; C. Cross-section of ascoma; D, E. Longitudinal sections of ascomata; F. Peridium; G–I. Asci in distilled water; J. Paraphyses; K. J+ apical apparatus bluing in Melzer's reagent; L–N. Ascospores; (M. Ascospore with germ slit. N. Ascospore in Indian ink). Scale bars: 0.2 mm (B–D); 100 µm (E); 10 µm (F–N).
